case_title: AIDE HUESO DIAZ et al VS. GUADALUPE DE LEON, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE DE LEON AND JESUS DE LEON'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFFS ARE REQUIRED TO PAY $7,615.94 TO DEFENDANTS BASED ON THE FACTORS DISCUSSED IN MANN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-09-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF DIAZ, AIDE HUESO DIAZ, JOSE HUESO
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CLAIM ATTORNEY'S FEES
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-28-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE DE LEON AND JESUS DE LEON'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 5 BECAUSE FILING AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION MAKING TENANTS TO EVICT AND SERVING EVICTION NOTICES ARE PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFFS CANNOT PREVAIL BECAUSE THE ALLEGED ACTS ARE COVERED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. DENIED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 12 AND 13 BECAUSE DISCRIMINATION DOES NOT ARISE OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2013 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., from MC Hall & Associates, 415-512-9865, for DefendantS and moving party
Joseph S. Tobener, J.D., from Tobener Law Center, 415-504-2165, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified.
DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE DE LEON AND JESUS DE LEON'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES IS Granted in part. Plaintiffs are required to pay $7,615.94 to defendants based on the factors discussed in Mann. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2011 Set For Trial On Jul-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Hearing On Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TOM H. ELKE OF THE TOBENER LAW CENTER, TEL. NO. 504-2165 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. FRANCISCO A. GUTIERREZ OF M C HALL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 512-9865 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GUADALUPE DE LEON AND JESUS DE LEON'S Special Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 5 BECAUSE FILING AN UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION MAKING TENANTS TO EVICT AND SERVING EVICTION NOTICES ARE PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF'S CANNOT PREVAIL BECAUSE THE ALLEGED ACTS ARE COVERED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. DENY AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 12 AND 13 BECAUSE DISCRIMINATION DOES NOT ARISE OUT OF PROTECTED ACTIVITY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =301/EHG
